mapper.insert: INSERT INTO reader (reader_id, password, real_name, gender, phone, email, department, max_borrow_count, current_borrow_count, fine_amount, status) VALUES (#{readerId}, #{password}, #{realName}, #{gender}, #{phone}, #{email}, #{department}, #{maxBorrowCount}, #{currentBorrowCount}, #{fineAmount}, #{status})
mapper.select: SELECT COUNT(*) FROM reader WHERE status = 1
mapper.update: UPDATE reader SET current_borrow_count = current_borrow_count + 1 WHERE id = #{id}
UPDATE reader SET current_borrow_count = GREATEST(current_borrow_count - 1, 0) WHERE id = #{id}
UPDATE reader SET fine_amount = fine_amount + #{amount} WHERE id = #{id}
UPDATE reader SET fine_amount = GREATEST(fine_amount - #{amount}, 0) WHERE id = #{id}
UPDATE reader SET status = #{status}, update_time = NOW() WHERE id = #{id}
UPDATE reader SET preferred_categories = #{preferredCategories}, update_time = NOW() WHERE id = #{id}
UPDATE reader SET language = #{language}, update_time = NOW() WHERE id = #{id}
